title: Rajasthan Board 12th Result 2026 Declared; Check Pass Percentage, Toppers' Names Here
description: RBSE 12th Result 2026: The overall pass percentages recorded across streams are 97.54 per cent in Arts, 96.23 per cent in Science, and 93.64 per cent in Commerce. A total of 1,46,044 students have secured first division, including 98,636 girls.
